Header file for power management functions, including wakeup, flash power down, and backup domain access.

# Purpose
This C header file declares three functions related to power management. The function [`pwr_enable_wakeup`](<#pwr_enable_wakeup>) enables or disables the wakeup feature based on the boolean parameter `enable`. The function [`pwr_flash_power_down_stop_mode`](<#pwr_flash_power_down_stop_mode>) controls the power-down state of the flash memory during stop mode, using the `power_down` boolean parameter to determine the state. The function [`pwr_access_backup_domain`](<#pwr_access_backup_domain>) manages access to the backup domain, with the `enable_access` parameter specifying whether to enable or disable access. These functions are likely used to configure power settings in a system.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
